attractions.name: Virginia Museum of Fine Arts (VMFA)
attractions.description: World-class free art museum with Fabergé eggs, Art Nouveau, Impressionist collections

attractions.name: Carytown
attractions.description: Mile-long strip of independent shops, restaurants, vintage stores, and cafés

attractions.name: James River Park System
attractions.description: 550+ acres of urban parkland along the James River, rapids, hiking, kayaking, swimming holes
attractions.frequency: Open daily dawn to dusk, rapids best spring-fall

attractions.name: Lewis Ginter Botanical Garden
attractions.description: 50-acre botanical garden with conservatory, children's garden, seasonal displays

attractions.name: American Civil War Museum
attractions.description: Comprehensive museum at Historic Tredegar with artifacts from all perspectives of the Civil War

attractions.name: Scott's Addition Craft Beverage District
attractions.description: Walkable neighborhood with 30+ breweries, cideries, meaderies, and distilleries

attractions.name: The Byrd Theatre
attractions.description: Beautifully restored 1928 movie palace in Carytown, Mighty Wurlitzer organ performances
attractions.frequency: Nightly films, Saturday organ concert before evening show

attractions.name: First Fridays Art Walk
attractions.description: Monthly art walk in the Broad Street Arts District with gallery openings and live music

attractions.name: Belle Isle
attractions.description: Island in the James River accessed via pedestrian bridge, hiking, rock hopping, Civil War ruins
attractions.frequency: Open daily, accessible from downtown via footbridge

attractions.name: Maymont
attractions.description: 100-acre Victorian estate with Japanese garden, Italian garden, nature center, and wildlife exhibits
